creator: rnordier@nordier.com
text:
farhad@icoe.att.com wrote:

> >Number:         10322
> >Category:       i386
> >Synopsis:       Making the boot disk

> Hello I want to make the Boot disk,
> To create the kern floppy image from DOS, I have to do something like
> this:
> 
> C> fdimage kern.flp a:
> 
> But where can i get the image kern.flp and mfsroot.flp to copy it 
> to the disk.

See the directory /pub/FreeBSD/3.1-RELEASE/floppies, either at
ftp.freebsd.org or a mirror site.

-- 
Robert Nordier
